texto: I think to a certain extent in Bosnia and among the Hutus in Rwanda and also among the Tutsis in Rwanda who then took revenge on the Hutus, there is a sense of being swept up and a sense that the society in which they live has gone mad.
explicacao: Citação de John Pomfret sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I think to a certain extent in Bosnia and among the Hutus in Rwanda and also among the Tutsis in …” articula reflexao, revenge, live em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como live e think.
